acceptance_targets: [CH16_PROSE_001] PASS if, across snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:43 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:224, the exact "thought of" construction appears no more than once and equivalent emotional information is delivered through at least two concrete sensory/action details; FAIL if the triadic cognition listing pattern remains.

[CH16_PROSE_002] PASS if the revised openings around snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:3, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:143, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:302 do not reuse the same token cluster in all three and each opening contains at least one location-specific sensory detail not shared by the others; FAIL if repeated motif language remains dominant across all entries.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if, across snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:43 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:224, the exact "thought of" construction appears no more than once and equivalent emotional information is delivered through at least two concrete sensory/action details; FAIL if the triadic cognition listing pattern remains.
findings.problem: Recurring cognition template ("thought of" list construction) appears more than twice and flattens interior rhythm into enumerated summary rather than scene-active interiority.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:43 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:224, replace at least two "thought of" clauses with embodied triggers tied to immediate environment or action (object contact, sound, physical reflex) so interiority emerges through scene texture instead of stacked cognition statements.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised openings around snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:3, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:143, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:302 do not reuse the same token cluster in all three and each opening contains at least one location-specific sensory detail not shared by the others; FAIL if repeated motif language remains dominant across all entries.
findings.problem: Environmental texture leans on repeated canonical token clusters (cicadas, bleach-old paper, fluorescent buzz, levee wind) in multiple scene entries, creating checklist feel and reducing sentence-level surprise.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework scene-entry texture at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:3, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:143, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:302 by retaining one anchor motif but varying at least two sensory vectors per entry (for example: tactile pressure, sound profile, or material detail unique to that location and beat) instead of repeating the same environmental signature set.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Focus on prose and copyedit finish: diction precision, rhythm control, sentence-level clarity, grammar, line-level polish without flattening style, and explicit aesthetic-risk audit (sanitization is the primary risk — do not soften or euphemize; push toward creative risk and specificity).
revision_pass.label: prose/copyedit fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: When edge cases arise, choose the version that preserves uncomfortable specificity and character accountability; do not replace difficult scenes with procedural summary, and do not mute class, race, sexuality, or institutional cruelty when those forces are actively shaping choices.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene with violence, racism, grief, or moral compromise is rendered in abstract or polite shorthand, revise to restore specific bodily, social, and material consequence before accepting the draft.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are the baseline in contemporary Mississippi speech; uncontracted forms are reserved for formality, emphasis, or social performance.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: rotate structural textures across chapters: procedural surge, quiet domestic interval, document-driven slow burn, dread preparation, aftermath inventory, and information-turn chapters; avoid repeating scene count plus dialogue density pattern in adjacent chapters.
prose_style_profile.diction: literary but grounded; precise legal and forensic terms when needed, balanced by lived vernacular and local material detail.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third person anchored primarily to Lena, with brief controlled expansions only when factual clarity requires it.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: alternate compressed procedural sentences with longer sensory-emotional lines so pressure and reflection keep rebalancing.
